title: Copper  Lighter Mod
description: A simple and dumb mod that adds a cheaper flint and steel alternative.
body:
This mod adds Copper Lighter, it can do everything a flint and steel can but it breaks easily. This mod is meant to be used with something like [unkindled](https://modrinth.com/mod/unkindled), but it doesn't have any mod dependencies.
This is just a simple mod I made while learning, probably wont update it. :3
